title: In vivo nanoparticle-mediated radiopharmaceutical-excited fluorescence molecular imaging.
author: Hu Z Qu Y Wang K Zhang X Zha J Song T Bao C Liu H Wang Z Wang J Liu Z Liu H Tian J
content: S-EPMC4491820 PMC4491820 In vivo nanoparticle-mediated radiopharmaceutical-excited fluorescence molecular imaging.
